title: Dungeons, Creatures and Classes (DnD): REMADE
description: A D&D inspired RPG mod with Mobs, structures, classes and a lot more!
body:
[![youtube icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc5d2510cfabb835a1e8001506b7c3b6574ecd59.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@luderspieler)
[![discord server](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/691871cb8485e502887fdc925360de07a79bc214.png)](https://discord.gg/fKCsbUauD7)

“Dungeons, Creatures and Classes (DnD): Remade” expands Minecraft with a focused progression system built around classes, advanced enemies, and flexible worldbuilding tools. The current version includes three fully playable classes, early draconic enemy types, and a growing arsenal of weapons.

The Barbarian is built for direct melee combat with high raw damage and rage-based effects. The Druid uses nature magic, shifting abilities, and supportive healing to adapt to different situations. The Assassin relies on stealth, mobility and critical burst damage, using invisibility and backstab mechanics to eliminate targets quickly.



A major part of the mod is the worldbuilding system. Players can create and customize NPCs directly in-game, assign roles, dialogue and behaviours, and use structure-placing tools to populate the world quickly with towns, dungeons or functional quest areas.
